name: Mohra
overview: After a tragedy strikes her family, Alizay seeks revenge against the wealthy Hamdani family, whose pride and greed have caused irreparable damage to her modest but once-happy life with her mother and sister.

trailers.title: Mohra | Full OST | Yashal Shahid | Ft. Mikaal Zulfiqar, Laiba Khan, Aagha Ali | Har Pal Geo
